changes.title: 新增
items: 新增 Windows 托管 Python 与 Git 运行时，并在设置中提供运行时选择。
新增带内置 Python/Git 与不带内置 Python/Git 的安装包构建变体。
Collab staged/unstaged 树视图支持选择文件夹，用于批量 stage 和 unstage。

changes.title: 修复
items: 改进 Unity 资产预览：文本预览支持语法高亮，Prefab 默认选中根对象。
修复应用启动与会话恢复路径中推理强度默认值被覆盖的问题。
Claude hook 日志会脱敏敏感请求头。
对齐 Collab 焦点样式。

changes.title: Added
items: Added managed Windows Python and Git runtimes, with runtime selection controls in Settings.
Added release installer variants for builds with bundled Python/Git and builds without bundled Python/Git.
Added folder selection in Collab staged/unstaged tree views for batch stage and unstage workflows.

changes.title: Fixed
items: Improved Unity asset previews with syntax highlighting for text previews and default root target selection for prefabs.
Fixed app bootstrap and session restore paths so they keep the user's saved reasoning effort defaults.
Redacted sensitive Claude hook headers from logs.
